title: Aller: places and near future
subtitle: Go somewhere, then say what you are going to do.
duolingoBridge: Useful beside Duolingo places, travel, daily actions, and future-like sentences.
overview: Knowledge point 1: aller + place says where you go.
Knowledge point 2: aller + infinitive says what you are going to do soon.

sections.title: Two easy uses
rows: You are going to the café.
She is going to the station.
They are going to come tomorrow.

items.fr: Demain, je vais étudier le français.
items.en: Tomorrow, I am going to study French.

items.fr: Ce soir, nous allons manger ici.
items.en: Tonight, we are going to eat here.
items.es: Esta noche vamos a comer aquí.

items.en: She is going to take the train.
items.es: Ella va a tomar el tren.
